info.title: Telegram Bot API
info.description: The Bot API is an HTTP-based interface created for developers keen on building bots for Telegram.

token.description: Bot authentication token obtained from BotFather

get.description: Returns basic information about the bot in form of a User object.

post.description: Returns basic information about the bot in form of a User object.

get.description: Use this method to receive incoming updates using long polling.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Identifier of the first update to be returned

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Limits the number of updates to be retrieved. Values between 1-100 are accepted. Defaults to 100.

parameters.name: timeout
parameters.description: Timeout in seconds for long polling.

parameters.name: allowed_updates
parameters.description: A JSON-serialized list of the update types you want your bot to receive.

post.description: Use this method to receive incoming updates using long polling.
Use this method to send text messages.

chat_id.description: Unique identifier for the target chat or username

message_thread_id.description: Unique identifier for the target message thread (topic) of the forum

text.description: Text of the message to be sent

parse_mode.description: Mode for parsing entities in the message text

disable_web_page_preview.description: Disables link previews for links in this message

protect_content.description: Protects the contents of the sent message from forwarding and saving

reply_to_message_id.description: If the message is a reply, ID of the original message

message_effect_id.description: Unique identifier of the message effect to be added to the message

direct_messages_topic_id.description: Unique identifier for the target direct messages topic

post.description: Use this method to send partial messages to a user while being generated (streaming).
Use this method to send photos.
Use this method to send video files.
Use this method to send audio files.
Use this method to send general files.
Use this method to send static .WEBP, animated .TGS, or video .WEBM stickers.
Use this method to send animation files (GIF or H.264/MPEG-4 AVC video without sound).
Use this method to send point on the map.
Use this method to send a native poll.
Use this method to forward messages of any kind.
Use this method to copy messages of any kind.
Use this method to create a topic in a forum supergroup chat or private chat.
Use this method to edit name and icon of a topic in a forum supergroup chat or private chat.
Use this method to delete a forum topic along with all its messages in a forum supergroup chat or private chat.
Use this method to clear the list of pinned messages in a forum topic.
Use this method to get a list of gifts received by a user.
Use this method to get a list of gifts received in a chat.
Use this method to get a list of gifts associated with a business account.
Use this method to fetch a list of audios added to the profile of a user.
Use this method to change the bot's profile picture.
Use this method to remove the bot's profile picture.
Use this method to repost stories across different business accounts managed by the bot.
Use this method to approve an incoming suggested post.
Use this method to decline an incoming suggested post.
Use this method to promote or demote a user in a supergroup or a channel.
Use this method when you need to tell the user that something is happening on the bot's side.
Use this method to get basic info about a file and prepare it for downloading.

BotToken.name: token
BotToken.description: Bot authentication token provided in the server URL path variable

ok.description: If true, the request was successful

ChatOwnerLeft.description: Service message about the chat owner leaving

ChatOwnerChanged.description: Service message about the chat owner being changed

SuggestedPostApproved.description: Service message about the approval of a suggested post

SuggestedPostApprovalFailed.description: Service message about the failed approval of a suggested post

SuggestedPostDeclined.description: Service message about the rejection of a suggested post

SuggestedPostPaid.description: Service message about a successful payment for a suggested post

SuggestedPostRefunded.description: Service message about a payment refund for a suggested post

UniqueGiftColors.description: Color scheme for a user's name, replies to messages and link previews based on a unique gift

tags.name: Messages
tags.description: Methods for sending and managing messages

tags.name: Direct Messages
tags.description: Methods for managing direct messages and suggested posts
